mnemonics.title: Three Bus Types: DAC
mnemonics.content: D-A-C: Data bus (carries Data, Bidirectional), Address bus (carries Addresses, Unidirectional from CPU), Control bus (carries Control signals like R/W, clock, interrupts).

mnemonics.title: Single vs Multiple Bus
mnemonics.content: Single bus = Simple & Slow (one transfer at a time, bottleneck). Multiple bus = More cost but More speed (parallel transfers possible).

mnemonics.title: Sync vs Async Bus
mnemonics.content: Sync bus has a Clock (like a metronome, everyone follows the same beat). Async bus has Handshaking (like a conversation, request then acknowledge, each device goes at its own pace).
